documentation.description:
Whether parsers for this list node parser accept...

``Allow_None``
  No extra separator.

``Allow_Leading``
  A separator that comes before the first element.

``Allow_Trailing``
  A separator that comes after the last element.

array_types.name: Field_Unparser_Array
array_types.code:
type Field_Unparser_Array is
  array (Positive range <>) of aliased Field_Unparser_Impl;

array_types.name: Node_Unparser_Map_Impl
array_types.code:
type Node_Unparser_Map_Impl is
  array (Type_Index range <>) of aliased Node_Unparser;

documentation.description:
Associate an unparser to all concrete nodes. Note that since type
indexes for concrete nodes are not continuous, some null items are
expected in Node_Unparser_Map values.

array_types.name: Token_Newline_Table_Impl
array_types.code:
type Token_Newline_Table_Impl is
  array (Token_Kind_Index range <>) of Boolean;

documentation.description: For each token kind, whether it must be followed by a line break

array_types.name: Token_Sequence_Array
array_types.code: type Token_Sequence_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Token_Sequence;

array_types.name: Token_Sequence_Impl
array_types.code:
type Token_Sequence_Impl is
  array (Positive range <>) of aliased Token_Unparser;

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific sequence of tokens

array_types.name: Token_Spacing_Table_Impl

documentation.description:
``Token_Spacing_Table_Impl (TF1, TF2)`` is whether a token that belongs
to the token family ``TF1`` followed by a token that belongs to the
token family ``TF2`` must be separated by at least a whitespace.

record_types.name: Field_Unparser_Impl

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific node field

fields.name: Member
fields.description: Member reference for the field to unparse

fields.name: Pre_Tokens
fields.description: Lists of tokens to emit before and after unparsing some node field

fields.name: Post_Tokens
fields.description: Lists of tokens to emit before and after unparsing some node field

fields.name: Empty_List_Is_Absent
fields.description:
Whether this field is to be considered as absent when it is an empty
list node.

record_types.name: Field_Unparser_List_Impl

documentation.description: Unparsing table for the fields corresponding to a specific regular node

fields.name: Field_Unparsers
fields.description:
For each field in the node, describe how to unparse it when it's
present. Nothing must be emitted when it's absent.

fields.name: Inter_Tokens
fields.description:
Inter_Tokens (I) specifies the list of tokens to emit after unparsing
field I-1 and field I. When it exists, Inter_Tokens (1) is always
Empty_Token_Sequence.

record_types.name: Node_Unparser_Impl

documentation.description: Unparsing descriptor for a non-abstract and non-synthetic concrete node

fields.name: Pre_Tokens
fields.description: List of tokens to emit first when unparsing this node

fields.name: Field_Unparsers
fields.description: Description of how to unparse fields

fields.name: Post_Tokens
fields.description: List of tokens to emit after fields are unparsed

fields.name: Separator
fields.description:
If Has_Separator is true, describe what separator token to emit
between two list items.

fields.name: Sep_Extra
fields.description: Whether this list node can have leading/trailing separators

record_types.name: Token_Unparser_Impl

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific token

fields.name: Kind
fields.description:
Token kind for the token to unparse. This is used to apply
spacing/newline rules during the unparsing of a sequence of tokens.

fields.name: Text
fields.description: Text to emit for that token

record_types.name: Unparsers_Impl

access_types.name: Field_Unparser
access_types.code: type Field_Unparser is access constant Field_Unparser_Impl;

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific node field

access_types.name: Field_Unparser_List
access_types.code: type Field_Unparser_List is access constant Field_Unparser_List_Impl;

access_types.name: Node_Unparser
access_types.code: type Node_Unparser is access constant Node_Unparser_Impl;

documentation.description: Unparsing descriptor for a non-abstract and non-synthetic concrete node

access_types.name: Node_Unparser_Map
access_types.code: type Node_Unparser_Map is access constant Node_Unparser_Map_Impl;

documentation.description:
Associate an unparser to all concrete nodes. Note that since type
indexes for concrete nodes are not continuous, some null items are
expected in Node_Unparser_Map values.

access_types.name: Token_Newline_Table
access_types.code: type Token_Newline_Table is access constant Token_Newline_Table_Impl;

documentation.description: For each token kind, whether it must be followed by a line break

access_types.name: Token_Sequence
access_types.code: type Token_Sequence is access constant Token_Sequence_Impl;

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific sequence of tokens

access_types.name: Token_Spacing_Table
access_types.code: type Token_Spacing_Table is access constant Token_Spacing_Table_Impl;

documentation.description:
``Token_Spacing_Table_Impl (TF1, TF2)`` is whether a token that belongs
to the token family ``TF1`` followed by a token that belongs to the
token family ``TF2`` must be separated by at least a whitespace.

access_types.name: Token_Unparser
access_types.code: type Token_Unparser is access constant Token_Unparser_Impl;

documentation.description: Description of how to unparse a specific token

access_types.name: Unparsers
access_types.code: type Unparsers is access constant Unparsers_Impl;
